mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id,c.writer_id,u.nickname,c.content,c.created_at,c.is_deleted FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.writer_id=u.user_id WHERE c.meeting_id=#{meetingId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET is_deleted=1, content="삭제된 댓글입니다." WHERE comment_id=#{commentId}
